title: Christine Lagarde: The energy shock: where we stand and what we need to know
SEC and CFTC Jointly Propose Amendments to Reduce Private Fund Reporting Burdens
content: The Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) and the Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC) jointly proposed amendments to reduce private fund reporting burdens while enabling the continued collection of necessary and appropriate information. The…

title: Statement on the Amendments to Form PF
Update on the SEC’s Work Toward Treasury Clearing Implementation
“PF” Stands for Please Fix: Statement on the Proposed Amendments to Form PF
FPC review of UK bank capital – summary of stakeholder evidence gathering event
content: The Financial Policy Committee is conducting a review of UK bank capital, which has included gathering evidence from a range of stakeholders. This event was part of that evidence gathering process.
